overall.description: A first-person perspective train ride through Night City's NCART metro system in Cyberpunk 2077. The journey travels along elevated tracks through a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape, passing glitch barriers, skyscrapers, station platforms, and deep urban canyons before arriving at a terminal station.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track beside glitch barrier

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART train past a glitching yellow hexagonal barrier wall with view of street traffic below

entered.detail: glitching yellow hexagonal wall structure running parallel to the train track
multi-lane street with moving vehicle traffic visible below the elevated track
dark modern building with illuminated windows running parallel to the track

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a glitching yellow hexagonal barrier wall on the right side of the elevated train track. The train moves forward with a view down to a city street with sparse traffic below on the left, flanked by a modern building facade.

events.description: passing the glitch barrier into open city view with large illuminated billboard becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along elevated tracks with clear view of commercial district and street traffic below

entered.detail: large white illuminated billboard displaying 'NICOLA' branding with warning symbols
tall modern glass building with reflective windows towering over the track

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the glitch barrier section into a more open commercial district. A large 'NICOLA' billboard dominates the right side while a glass office tower rises on the left. The track continues elevated above the city streets with visible traffic below.

agents.ego_description: traveling along the side of skyscrapers with illuminated office windows passing by at close range

entered.detail: rows of lit windows in the office building showing interior activity
structural ledges and architectural details of adjacent buildings

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrow corridor between tall buildings, with illuminated office windows visible at close range on the left. The environment is more enclosed with building ledges and architectural details passing by on both sides.

events.description: entering covered station platform with benches, transit map, and advertisements

agents.ego_description: passing through the station platform without stopping, observing the empty benches and transit displays

entered.detail: covered station platform with concrete flooring and safety markings
illuminated transit map showing the NCART rail network routes
advertisement poster for 'REAL WATER' with person holding bottle
concrete waiting benches along the platform wall

segments.scene_description: The train enters a covered NCART station platform featuring concrete benches, an illuminated subway map display, and advertisement posters. The platform is empty as the train continues through without stopping.

events.description: passing through section with bright cyan spotlights illuminating the track area

agents.ego_description: traveling through a dark urban canyon with occasional spotlights and holographic billboards visible on building walls

entered.detail: tall dark building facades forming a narrow canyon around the track
bright cyan colored spotlight beam illuminating the track from above
holographic advertisement showing a luxury vehicle floating in display

segments.scene_description: Exiting the station, the train enters a deep urban canyon between towering skyscrapers. The environment is darker with cyan spotlights cutting through the haze. Holographic billboards including a floating vehicle advertisement appear on the building walls as the train continues through the enclosed cityscape.

events.description: approaching final destination station with arrival timer and terminal structure becoming visible
train decelerates and comes to a complete stop at the arrival platform

agents.ego_description: slowing down and arriving at the destination terminal station, coming to a complete stop

entered.detail: concrete platform of the destination station with safety barriers
digital display showing '00:00' timer and arrival information
dark red fabric or panel structure at the terminal entrance

segments.scene_description: The train approaches its final destination, entering a semi-covered terminal station. A digital timer display shows arrival information as the train slows down. The platform features red structural elements and digital signage before the train comes to a complete stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey on an elevated train that transitions from a glitching industrial perimeter into the dense, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by passing a flickering yellow hexagonal barrier wall and a sparse city street before emerging into an open commercial district dominated by a massive Nicola billboard and glass office towers. The view then tightens as the train glides through a narrow corridor of illuminated office windows, momentarily entering a quiet, covered NCART station with concrete benches and subway maps. As the train exits the station, the environment shifts into a dark, hazy urban canyon where cyan spotlights and holographic vehicle advertisements cling to towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera moves into a semi-covered terminal station characterized by red structural elements and digital arrival timers as the train slows to a complete stop.
